data_description.api_url: Base URL of your kio API, e.g. http://api.kio.example.local
data_description.api_key: Optional API key (X-API-Key). Leave blank if auth is disabled.
data_description.api_ip: Optional. If HA cannot resolve the hostname (e.g. .int TLD DNS issue), enter the server IP here (e.g. 192.168.1.10).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure kio
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for this kio instance, e.g. after rotating the API key.

data_description.api_url: Base URL of your kio API, e.g. http://api.kio.example.local
data_description.api_key: API key (X-API-Key). Leave blank if auth is disabled.
data_description.api_ip: Optional. If HA cannot resolve the hostname, enter the server IP here.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the kio API. Check the URL and network.

abort.already_configured: This kio instance is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: That API URL points at a different kio instance than this entry.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force an immediate data refresh from the kio API for all configured instances.

navigate.name: Navigate
navigate.description: Point one or more kiosks at a URL.

url.name: URL
url.description: The URL to load on the kiosk.
